{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Tutorial 1: Fitting LC Models to a CPW\n",
    "\n",
    "This tutorial walks through the **single-point** workflow in `simpleLOMs.system`.\n",
    "\n",
    "You will:\n",
    "- Define CPW geometry and coupling capacitances\n",
    "- Fit Foster, Optimized, and Analytical LC models\n",
    "- Run `analyze_system()` to compare all models against the CPW reference\n",
    "- Inspect resonance frequencies, linewidths, and **circle-fit** hybridization shifts\n",
    "\n",
    "`analyze_system()` uses reflection circle fits on **S11 and S22** for $f_0$ and $\\kappa$, and for loaded-network mode shifts (primary metric: keys ending in `CF`).\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import skrf as rf\n",
    "\n",
    "from simpleLOMs import CPWParams, FosterFit, OptimizedFit, AnalyticalFit, analyze_system\n",
    "from simpleLOMs.analysis import circle_fit_f0_kappa, resonance_from_s_max\n",
    "from simpleLOMs.networks.cpw import cpw_resonator_network_2port\n",
    "from simpleLOMs.plotting import plot_re_im, plot_lom_vs_data_re_im, plot_all_models\n",
    "from simpleLOMs.models.optimized_fit import OptimizationConfig\n",
    "from simpleLOMs.utils import make_results_table, make_params_table\n",
    "\n",
    "print(\"Imports OK\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "---\n",
    "## 1. Device parameters\n",
    "\n",
    "Define CPW geometry (`CPWParams`), coupling capacitances, and two LC loads representing qubits or auxiliary resonators.\n",
    "\n",
    "In practice, extract `Cc1`, `Cc2`, `Ctog1`, `Ctog2` from your EM solver (HFSS, COMSOL, etc.).\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "cpw_params = CPWParams(\n",
    "    w=11.7e-6,\n",
    "    s=5.1e-6,\n",
    "    t=0.0,\n",
    "    h=500e-6,\n",
    "    rho=1e-19,\n",
    "    ep_r=11.45,\n",
    "    has_metal_backside=True,\n",
    "    tand=0.0,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "d = 7.0e-3\n",
    "Z0 = 15.0\n",
    "analytical_Z0 = 45.926\n",
    "\n",
    "Cc1, Cc2 = 3.0e-14, 7.0e-14\n",
    "Ctog1, Ctog2 = 4.0e-14, 6.0e-14\n",
    "\n",
    "Lload1, Cload1 = 2e-9, 6.0e-13\n",
    "Lload2, Cload2 = 4e-9, 6.0e-13\n",
    "\n",
    "f_load1 = 1.0 / (2 * np.pi * np.sqrt(Lload1 * Cload1)) / 1e9\n",
    "f_load2 = 1.0 / (2 * np.pi * np.sqrt(Lload2 * Cload2)) / 1e9\n",
    "print(f\"Load 1 bare resonance: {f_load1:.4f} GHz\")\n",
    "print(f\"Load 2 bare resonance: {f_load2:.4f} GHz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Coarse band for initial fitting; analyze_system refines around the CPW resonance\n",
    "freq = rf.Frequency(6e9, 9e9, 400_001, unit=\"Hz\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 1a. Inspect the unloaded CPW network (optional)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "cpw = cpw_resonator_network_2port(\n",
    "    freq, d, Cc1, Cc2, Ctog1, Ctog2, cpw_params=cpw_params, Z0=Z0,\n",
    ")\n",
    "f0_s11, k_s11 = circle_fit_f0_kappa(cpw, m=0, n=0)\n",
    "print(f\"CPW circle-fit S11: f0={f0_s11/1e9:.4f} GHz, kappa={k_s11/1e6:.3f} MHz\")\n",
    "\n",
    "plot_re_im(cpw, m=0, n=0, quantity=\"re\", title=\"CPW Re(S11)\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "---\n",
    "## 2. Fit each model individually\n",
    "\n",
    "Three LC extraction methods are available. Each returns effective $L$ and $C$ you can reuse in circuit simulations.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 2a. AnalyticalFit\n",
    "\n",
    "Closed-form estimate from a specified resonance frequency and characteristic impedance.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "from simpleLOMs.models.analytical_fit import AnalyticalFit\n",
    "\n",
    "analytical = AnalyticalFit()\n",
    "analytical.fit(freq, f_r=f0_s11, Z0=analytical_Z0)\n",
    "analytical_net = analytical.get_network(freq, Cc1, Cc2, Ctog1, Ctog2, Z0=Z0)\n",
    "print(analytical)\n",
    "plot_lom_vs_data_re_im(analytical_net, cpw, m=0, n=0, lom_label=\"Analytical\", data_label=\"CPW\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 2b. FosterFit\n",
    "\n",
    "Extracts $L$ and $C$ from the admittance slope at resonance (Phys. Rev. Lett. **108**, 240502).\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "foster = FosterFit(cpw_params=cpw_params)\n",
    "foster.fit(freq, d=d)\n",
    "foster_net = foster.get_network(freq, Cc1, Cc2, Ctog1, Ctog2, Z0=Z0)\n",
    "print(foster)\n",
    "plot_lom_vs_data_re_im(foster_net, cpw, m=0, n=0, lom_label=\"Foster\", data_label=\"CPW\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 2c. OptimizedFit\n",
    "\n",
    "Two-stage numerical optimization against CPW S-parameters. Usually the most accurate.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "config = OptimizationConfig(verbose=False, n_widths=4)\n",
    "optimized = OptimizedFit(config=config)\n",
    "optimized.fit(\n",
    "    freq,\n",
    "    data_ntw=cpw,\n",
    "    Cc1=Cc1, Cc2=Cc2,\n",
    "    Ctog1=Ctog1, Ctog2=Ctog2,\n",
    "    d=d,\n",
    "    cpw_params=cpw_params,\n",
    "    Z0=Z0,\n",
    ")\n",
    "opt_net = optimized.get_network(freq, Cc1, Cc2, Z0=Z0)\n",
    "print(optimized)\n",
    "plot_lom_vs_data_re_im(opt_net, cpw, m=0, n=0, lom_label=\"Optimized\", data_label=\"CPW\")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "---\n",
    "## 3. Full system analysis with `analyze_system()`\n",
    "\n",
    "`analyze_system()` runs all three fits, extracts $f_0$ and $\\kappa$ via **reflection circle fits** on S11/S22, builds loaded networks, and reports hybridization shifts.\n",
    "\n",
    "The returned dict includes model objects (`cpw_network`, `foster_model`, \u2026) and scalar metrics.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "results = analyze_system(\n",
    "    freq=freq,\n",
    "    d=d,\n",
    "    Cc1=Cc1, Cc2=Cc2,\n",
    "    Ctog1=Ctog1, Ctog2=Ctog2,\n",
    "    Lload1=Lload1, Cload1=Cload1,\n",
    "    Lload2=Lload2, Cload2=Cload2,\n",
    "    cpw_params=cpw_params,\n",
    "    Z0=Z0,\n",
    "    analytical_Z0=analytical_Z0,\n",
    "    verbose=False,\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "scalar_keys = [k for k in results if not hasattr(results[k], \"s\")]\n",
    "print(f\"{len(scalar_keys)} scalar result keys\")\n",
    "print(\"Primary shift metric:\", results[\"Optimized all shifts CF (GHz)\"])\n",
    "print(\"Shift error vs CPW:\", results[\"Optimized shift errors CF (%)\"])\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 3a. Summary tables\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "print(make_results_table(results))\n",
    "print()\n",
    "print(make_params_table(results))\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 3b. Overlay all models\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "plot_all_models(\n",
    "    {\n",
    "        \"CPW\": results[\"cpw_network\"],\n",
    "        \"Foster\": results[\"foster_network\"],\n",
    "        \"Optimized\": results[\"optimized_network\"],\n",
    "        \"Analytical\": results[\"analytical_network\"],\n",
    "    },\n",
    "    m=0, n=0,\n",
    "    quantity=\"re\",\n",
    "    title=\"Re(S11) from analyze_system()\",\n",
    ")\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "### 3c. Extract fitted parameters from model objects\n",
    "\n",
    "Each fitted model exposes `.get_params()` for downstream circuit design.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "execution_count": null,
   "source": [
    "for name in [\"optimized_model\", \"foster_model\", \"analytical_model\"]:\n",
    "    model = results[name]\n",
    "    print(name, model.get_params())\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "---\n",
    "## Next steps\n",
    "\n",
    "- **Tutorial 2** \u2014 sweep coupling capacitances and load frequencies to map model accuracy (`run_accuracy_sweep`, `run_accuracy_sweep_load_grid`)\n",
    "- **Tutorial 3** \u2014 explore geometry and circuit design with `SweepConfig` (`sweeps.py`)\n"
   ]
  }
 ],
 "metadata": {
  "kernelspec": {
   "display_name": "Python 3",
   "language": "python",
   "name": "python3"
  },
  "language_info": {
   "name": "python",
   "pygments_lexer": "ipython3"
  }
 },
 "nbformat": 4,
 "nbformat_minor": 5
}
